sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89907" key="prospa/reimi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσπάρ-ειμι</orth>, <sense id="n89907.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be present with besides</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Petos.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:124:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">124.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
